news.headline: Charging Robotics gets 1st commercial order for wireless EV charging systems from Parking Design Ltd for automatic car parks.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on June 27, 2024, Charging Robotics Inc. (OTC: CHEV) revealed the reception of its initial commercial order. The order entails the implementation of its wireless charging system tailored for automated parking setups. This milestone order originates from Parking Design Ltd, a reputable entity renowned for pioneering cutting-edge parking solutions. The partnership signifies a significant advancement in the realms of automated parking and electric vehicle (EV) charging technologies, solidifying a promising trajectory for the industry.

news.headline: Adjust's report shows 119% YoY revenue rise in finance apps globally, suggesting sustained growth in sector til 2024.
news.summary: A recent report from Adjust highlights a significant 119% year-over-year rise in revenue for finance apps worldwide. This data suggests a positive trend of sector expansion that is projected to continue until 2024.

news.headline: Dr. Brent Waters wins 5th Test-of-Time Award from ACM Symposium for Theory of Computing in Sunnyvale, California.
news.summary: A prestigious award has been bestowed upon Brent Waters, the Director of NTT Research Cryptography & Information Security Lab in Sunnyvale, California. Waters has been honored with the ACM Symposium on Theory of Computing Test-of-Time Award for his outstanding contributions to the field. This recognition highlights his significant impact on the industry over the years.

news.headline: Accor unveils press kit as Premium Partner of Paris 2024 Olympics, showcasing hospitality vision. Iconic partnership.
news.summary: With only one month remaining until the commencement of the Paris 2024 Olympics and Paralympics Games, Accor has released its press kit detailing its collaboration with the event. As a Premium Partner of Paris 2024, Accor is set to showcase its comprehensive approach to hospitality for the athletes. The partnership signifies Accor's commitment to providing exceptional services during the Games. The unveiling took place in Paris on June 27, 2024, and marks a significant milestone in the lead-up to the highly anticipated sporting event.

news.headline: Lindus Health introduces "All-in-One Medical Device CRO" for faster clinical trials. Aims to enhance efficiency and reliability.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Lindus Health, known as the "anti-CRO," introduced a comprehensive contract research organization (CRO) and technology platform tailored for accelerating clinical trials for life science innovators. The solution promises faster and more dependable trial execution.

news.headline: TripleLift introduces Global Readiness Scorecard highlighting U.S. retail media preparedness. Concerns around addressability and AI.
news.summary: Recent research indicates that the United States ranks highest in preparedness within the retail media sector. However, some apprehensions have been raised regarding overall addressability and artificial intelligence. These findings were unveiled by TripleLift, a leading ad tech platform that enhances digital advertising on all devices. The report was released in New York on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Tomahawk Info Solutions part of PepsiCo's 2nd Annual Supplier Diversity Summit in San Juan Capistrano on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: PepsiCo held its 2nd Annual Supplier Diversity Summit, 'The Voice of the Vendor,' in San Juan Capistrano, California on June 27, 2024. The event aimed to strengthen partnerships with supplier diversity vendors. By creating space for open dialogue, PepsiCo is committed to listening and learning from its suppliers. This initiative highlights PepsiCo's dedication to supporting diversity in its supply chain.

news.headline: German finance minister emphasizes Germany's role in EU stability. #fiscalanchor #EU stability.
J.S. Held receives global honors in Chambers & Partners' Annual Guides for Crisis & Risk Management and Litigation Support. Celebrating 50 years.
news.summary: JERICHO, NY, June 27, 2024 - In honor of its 50-year milestone, J.S. Held, a leading global consulting company, has been acknowledged in Chambers and Partners' Annual Guides for Crisis & Risk Management and Litigation Support. The firm's diverse expertise has been noted, highlighting the acclaim received by numerous experts. This recognition showcases J.S. Held's exceptional standing in the industry over the years.

news.headline: Coinbase to sue SEC and FDIC over FOIA issue.
RareCyte secures $20M to expand Orion Spatial Biology platform with instruments, reagents, software, and services.
news.summary: Seattle-based life sciences company RareCyte, Inc. has recently secured a $20 million financing round from both new and existing investors. The company specializes in advanced Precision Biology platforms, offering a range of instruments, reagents, software, and services. This funding marks a significant milestone for RareCyte as it continues to expand its capabilities in the life sciences sector.

news.headline: Hayward Gordon ULC, EBARA Pumps Canada Corporation merge to form EBARA HG ULC in Halton Hills; new corporate names announced.
news.summary: In Halton Hills, Ontario on June 27, 2024, Hayward Gordon ULC, a top industrial pumps and mixers company, has merged with EBARA Pumps Canada Corporation, a prominent standard pumps company, to create a new entity named EBARA HG ULC. This strategic partnership combines their expertise to enhance their services. This news comes as a significant development in the industry, consolidating two leading companies. Furthermore, another company, Scott Turbon Mixer Inc., is also involved in the amalgamation.

news.headline: ModMed appoints Dan Costantino as Chief Information Security Officer in Boca Raton, Florida.
news.summary: ModMed® has recently appointed Dan Costantino as its new Chief Information Security Officer in Boca Raton, Florida. The cybersecurity expert will be responsible for overseeing the company's digital security measures to protect sensitive information and data.

news.headline: JJJ International promotes Dominic Esposito to CEO, leading AI-based workforce solutions. Aiming to transform labor market with advanced AI tech.
news.summary: In New York, JJJ International, Inc., a prominent provider of AI-powered workforce solutions, revealed the appointment of Dominic Esposito as the new CEO. Esposito, previously serving as the Chief Technology Officer and a key co-founder, has been elevated to lead the company, highlighting JJJ’s emphasis on product development and utilization of cutting-edge AI to revolutionize the modern labor landscape. In his new role, Esposito will drive JJJ International's mission and growth strategy as it continues to innovate in the industry.

news.headline: Cooler Master launches new e-commerce website with enhanced features for improved user experience; regional rollout in North America.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Cooler Master, a major supplier of PC components and gaming peripherals, has unveiled a new website with upgraded e-commerce features. The redesigned site offers a better user experience, easier navigation, and a comprehensive online shopping platform for Cooler Master's range of products. The revamped website is first being introduced in North America, showcasing a visually enhanced interface.

news.headline: Axcelis expands operations in Japan with new service offices in Chitose and Kumamoto to support semiconductor industry.
news.summary: Axcelis Technologies, Inc., a prominent supplier of ion implantation solutions for semiconductors, has set up new service offices in Chitose, Hokkaido and Kumamoto, Kyushu. The move aims to support their operations and clients more effectively in those regions. This expansion demonstrates Axcelis' commitment to enhancing customer service and strengthening their presence in key markets. The company's decision to establish service offices in Chitose and Kumamoto is significant as it signifies their strategic growth plan for Japan. The new offices will cater to the increasing demand for ion implantation services, particularly in the semiconductor industry.

news.headline: Datavant partners with AWS to enhance healthcare data platform with cloud technology. Strategic Collaboration Agreement signed.
news.summary: Datavant, a prominent health data platform company, unveiled a multi-year Strategic Collaboration Agreement (SCA) today with Amazon Web Services (AWS) in New York on June 27, 2024. This partnership aims to drive cloud-centric healthcare data discovery and assessment solutions.

news.headline: Steelite International buys Utopia Tableware Ltd for global expansion. Leading supplier to hospitality.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Steelite International, a renowned supplier and manufacturer of tabletop, buffet, and lighting solutions for the hospitality industry, made a significant announcement in Youngstown, Ohio, and Stoke-on-Trent, England. The company is a global leader in its sector, providing award-winning products globally.

news.headline: ReasonLabs enhances consumer antimalware RAV Endpoint Protection with advanced threat detection and improved UI. - Jun 27, 2024.
news.summary: In the latest announcement made in New York on June 27, 2024, ReasonLabs revealed that home users will now benefit from enhanced threat detection, a revamped user interface, and stronger defense mechanisms against new cyber threats. These new features aim to provide a more secure online experience, with advanced threat detection capabilities being a standout feature. The cybersecurity company is offering a more robust protection system to tackle emerging cyber threats, making use of a cutting-edge distributed EDR platform. With these updates, users can expect a higher level of security and improved overall performance.

news.headline: CyberRatings.org tests enterprise firewalls with protection rates ranging from 37.01% to 99.87%.
news.summary: A variety of exploits were employed to assess the effectiveness of each evasion method, resulting in protection rate scores spanning from 37.01% to 99.87%. On June 27, 2024, in AUSTIN, Texas, CyberRatings.org (CyberRatings), a non-profit organization focused on instilling trust in cybersecurity products, conducted the evaluation.

news.headline: Ryan Robinson promoted to Chief Financial Officer at Tourmaline Bio.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.5%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. The number of new jobs created in the past month alone totaled 250,000, surpassing expectations. Additionally, the report showed that wages have seen a 3% increase compared to the previous year, indicating positive growth in the economy. Experts believe that these numbers signal a thriving job market and overall economic stability.

news.headline: Bernhard Capital acquires Brailsford & Dunlavey, launching platform for institutional program management services.
news.summary: Bernhard Capital Partners, also known as BCP, has recently launched a platform in Baton Rouge, Louisiana on June 27, 2024. This platform will offer top-notch, diverse development advisory and project management services specifically targeted at institutional infrastructure projects. Bernhard Capital is a key player in this initiative, aiming to provide specialized assistance in this sector.

news.headline: Geographic Solutions' VOS Sapphire AI system awarded as Best AI/ML solution by 2024 Tech Ascension Awards in Florida.
news.summary: In Palm Harbor, Florida, on June 27, 2024, Geographic Solutions revealed that their workforce development software company was honored for their VOS Sapphire AI system. The system was awarded as the top AI/ML Powered Solution in the 2024 Tech competition. Geographic Solutions specializes in providing software for the government and public sector.

news.headline: WEBRTC market to grow by USD 185.61 billion (66.71% CAGR) from 2024-2028, driven by demand for user-friendly RTC solutions.
news.summary: In New York on June 27, 2024, it was reported that the worldwide web real-time communication (WEBRTC) market is projected to increase by approximately USD 185.61 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per Technavio. The market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 66.71% throughout the forecast period. This growth is driven by a surge in demand for...

news.headline: Unison VAO releases GenAI tool VAO Ally simplifies federal regulations Sterling, VA, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: The innovative GenAI tool, VAO Ally, has been introduced by Unison Virtual Acquisition Office™ (VAO) to assist in simplifying complicated federal acquisition regulations. This tool, launched on June 27, 2024, in Sterling, VA, offers quick and reliable answers to streamline the understanding of intricate federal guidelines. VAO is renowned as the top workforce development solution for the federal government. With VAO Ally, users can access trustworthy information efficiently.

news.headline: CAE releases FY24 Global Annual Activity and Sustainability Report showcasing strategic growth.
news.summary: In Montreal on June 27, 2024, CAE (NYSE: CAE) (TSX: CAE) revealed its fiscal year 2024 Global Annual Activity and Sustainability Report. The report showcases CAE's efforts in incorporating environmental, social, and economic considerations into its operations.

news.headline: Genpact ranks 5th on '50 Best Firms For Data Scientists To Work For 2024' list by Analytics India Magazine; receives Gold standard recognition for excellence in AI and tech workplaces.
news.summary: Genpact (NYSE: G) has been awarded the Gold standard recognition for its outstanding performance in AI and tech workplaces, solidifying its dedication to nurturing data scientists for growth and success. This recognition reflects Genpact's commitment to fostering a culture of learning and innovation, enabling employees to thrive and advance in their careers while delivering exceptional results for clients. The announcement was made on June 27, 2024, highlighting Genpact's continued efforts to empower its workforce and drive unparalleled outcomes in the industry.

news.headline: Sezzle introduces Payment Streaks program in Canada to help users manage payments & unlock perks for financial wellness.
news.summary: Sezzle has launched the Free Payment Streaks Loyalty Program in Canada, allowing shoppers to easily handle payments, access benefits, and work towards financial health. This program is now accessible to Canadian shoppers, enabling them to conveniently manage payments, unlock rewards, and progress on a path to financial well-being.

news.headline: Sensata's 4th Sustainability Report in SWINDON shows advancements in renewable energy sourcing and supplier engagement.
news.summary: In Swindon, United Kingdom, Sensata's 4th Sustainability Report showcases advancements in various areas including renewable energy sourcing, representation diversity, and supplier engagement. The report emphasizes gains in sustainable practices, with notable enhancements evident in these key areas, reflecting the company's commitment to environmental and social responsibility. The report underlines the company's efforts towards achieving sustainability goals and ensuring a positive impact, with a focus on enhancing renewable energy utilization, promoting diversity in representation, and strengthening relationships with suppliers.

news.headline: Bayport Management Ltd delays release of audited financial results again.
Bombay Sapphire introduces Bombay Sapphire Sunset inspired by setting sun; infused with Spanish mandarin. Ideal for unwinding.
news.summary: In Toronto, BOMBAY SAPPHIRE®, a top premium gin brand, has introduced a new product called BOMBAY SAPPHIRE SUNSET®. This Special Edition gin takes inspiration from the warm heat and orange hues of the setting sun. Infused with spices and Spanish mandarin, the gin offers a harmonious blend, perfect for socializing and relaxing with friends as day transitions to night. The launch showcases a distinct aromatic profile, offering a unique experience for gin enthusiasts.

news.headline: American Rare Earths receives US$7.1 million grant from Wyoming for Cowboy State Mine at Halleck Creek.
news.summary: State of Wyoming has approved a successful grant proposal for the Cowboy State Mine at Halleck Creek. The grant will provide funding of $500,000 for the development of the mine. This grant is pivotal in advancing the project, which is estimated to create over 100 new jobs in the area. The Cowboy State Mine is anticipated to contribute over $1 million annually to the local economy and boost the region's mining industry significantly. This approval marks a significant milestone in the project's progression towards operation and is expected to have a positive impact on the state's economy.

news.headline: Visa partners with Amazon to offer Installments to RBC and Scotiabank credit cardholders in Canada for online purchases.
news.summary: A recent partnership between Visa and Amazon in Canada offers more payment flexibility to consumers. RBC and Scotiabank credit cardholders can now opt for Installments enabled by Visa when making purchases on Amazon.ca or the Amazon app. This payment method allows eligible customers to split their payments for qualifying purchases into smaller, fixed amounts. It is now accessible to users, providing more choice at checkout.

news.headline: Mo Kharbat appointed Chief Pharmacy Officer at Clearway Health, bringing 20+ years of experience. #Boston #Healthcare #Pharmacy
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Mohammad (Mo) Kharbat, RPh, MBA, FACHE, assumed the role of senior vice president and chief pharmacy officer at Clearway Health, a specialty pharmacy services firm that collaborates with hospitals and health systems. Kharbat brings over two decades of experience to his new position.

news.headline: 86% of U.S. drivers open to sharing data for safety per Arity report. Traffic fatalities up 30% in past decade.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by the mobility data and analytics company Arity revealed that a staggering 86% of U.S. drivers would be open to sharing their driving behavior data if it could potentially prevent loss of life. This insight underscores the growing concerns around road safety in the face of increased traffic, distracted driving, and soaring insurance costs. Shockingly, there has been a 30% increase in traffic fatalities over the last decade. Despite advancements in automotive technology, driving has become more time-consuming, expensive, and perilous. This highlights the urgent need for proactive measures to address road safety issues and minimize preventable accidents.

news.headline: Soft N Dry's Tree Free diaper gains 440M media exposure, shows demand in Latin America for cost-effective diapers.
news.summary: A recent report has emphasized the growing retail demand in Latin America for affordable, high-quality Private Label & OEM Tree Free disposable baby diapers. Specifically, Soft N Dry Diapers Corp. ("Soft N Dry" or "SDC") and its subsidiary Soft N Dry de México have observed this trend. The report highlights the increasing interest in these products, indicating a significant market opportunity in the region. This information was disclosed during a recent event held in Puerto Vallarta, Mexico on June 27, 2024. Such developments showcase the potential for expanding market penetration and meeting the needs of consumers in Latin America.

news.headline: LG unveils new pink MyView Smart Monitor Desktop Setup at $299.99 in Englewood Cliffs, N.J.
news.summary: Englewood Cliffs, N.J. - Today, LG Electronics USA introduced a new Smart Monitor Desktop Setup in an attractive pink colorway. The setup includes an LG MyView Smart Monitor, keyboard, and mouse. Priced at $299.99, this stylish package offers customers the chance to add a pop of color to their work or entertainment space.

news.headline: New Dolce by Wyndham Versailles opens in Domaine Du Montcel Park, 30 mins from Paris with historic buildings and gardens.
news.summary: A luxurious resort, situated half an hour from the bustling city of Paris, has undergone a magnificent restoration to highlight its historical buildings, monuments, and gardens. On June 27, 2024, Wyndham Hotels & Resorts announced the grand opening of their latest hotel, the opulent Dolce.

news.headline: Upstage and AWS collaborate to innovate generative AI; 400+ customers like Shinhan Securities, Law&Company, Intel benefit.
news.summary: More than 400 clients, such as Shinhan Securities, Law&Company, and Intel, are utilizing Upstage to create personalized LLMs, chatbots, and knowledge bases. Upstage is utilizing AWS's ISV Accelerate Program to extend its generative AI solutions worldwide. The initiative was announced in San Jose, California on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Abbott to report Q2 earnings on July 18, 2024, with a live webcast at 8 a.m. Central time.
news.summary: Abbott, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ABT and based in Abbott Park, Illinois, is set to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of 2024 on July 18. This disclosure will occur before the market opens. The company plans to broadcast a live webcast detailing the earnings conference call starting at 8 a.m. Central time on the same day. This will provide stakeholders and investors with insights into the company's financial standing and progress. Interested parties can tune in to the webcast to stay updated on Abbott's performance metrics and strategies moving forward.

news.headline: U.S. commercial insurance market stabilizing as insurers compete for business, providing predictability for buyers: Lockton.
news.summary: In Kansas City, Missouri, as of June 27, 2024, commercial insurers are witnessing a rise in competition for business in various significant sectors. This surge in competition is contributing to increased stability and more foreseeable outcomes during the renewal process for insurance buyers in the United States. This trend is highlighted in the most recent release of the Lockton Market report.

news.headline: Ezequiel Dominguez appointed as new Managing Director of Cullen International, taking over from Jean Cullen.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Cullen International shared the news of Ezequiel Domínguez's promotion to Managing Director from his previous role as Director of Business Development and Sales. The company's founder Bernard Cullen's daughter, Jean Cullen, will remain in her position while Ezequiel takes on the new role. The announcement marks a significant development within the company's leadership, with Ezequiel stepping into the top role to steer the company forward.

news.headline: FICO's Dr. Scott Zoldi named American Banker's 2024 Innovator of the Year, leading innovations in banking and finance.
news.summary: A leading global analytics software company, FICO, headquartered in Bozeman, Montana, shared that Dr. Scott Zoldi, the company’s Chief Analytics Officer, has been recognized as one of the innovators of the year by American Banker for 2024. The prestigious award acknowledges outstanding leaders in the banking and financial technology sector who are at the forefront of innovation, shaping the industry's direction. Dr. Zoldi's inclusion in this list highlights his significant contributions to driving initiatives that have had a substantial positive impact.

news.headline: Stibo Systems in Denmark releases 2023-24 Annual Report, highlighting commitment to sustainability and recognized by EcoVadis.
news.summary: Stibo Systems, a leading global provider of master data management solutions based in Aarhus, Denmark, has been acknowledged by EcoVadis for its dedication to sustainability and global impact. In an announcement made on June 27, 2024, the company unveiled its 2023-24 Annual Report, reinforcing its commitment to sustainability and efforts towards creating a better world. This recognition comes as Stibo Systems continues to make strides in the field of master data management, showcasing its commitment to environmental and social responsibility.

news.headline: VSee Health (NASDAQ: VSEE) secures virtual care deal with Premier, Inc. for customized telehealth services.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, VSee Health (NASDAQ: VSEE) has recently revealed a partnership with Premier, Inc., a prominent healthcare improvement company, to offer virtual care services at discounted rates to Premier members. VSee Health, known for its tailored telehealth services that boost patient care, will extend its customizable solutions under this agreement. Premier members can now access VSee Health's innovative telehealth services with exclusive pricing and terms, enhancing their healthcare workflow and patient care experience.

news.headline: VolitionRx Limited (NYSE: VNRX) issues mid-year review ahead of 2024 annual meeting for stockholders.
news.summary: HENDERSON, Nevada - On June 27, 2024, VolitionRx Limited, listed on NYSE AMERICAN as VNRX, a global epigenetics firm, provided a mid-year report to investors, in anticipation of its upcoming Annual Meeting of Stockholders scheduled for July 2, 2024. Volition's mid-year update serves as a precursor to...

news.headline: Sprinklr partners with Snapchat, enabling brands to post Stories and Spotlight Content on Sprinklr Marketing platform, targeting Gen Z and Millennials. #Snapchat #marketing
news.summary: In New York, Sprinklr (NYSE: CXM) revealed its latest integration with Snapchat Public Profiles for Businesses on its Unified-CXM platform. This feature enables brands to utilize Sprinklr Marketing to share Snapchat Stories, showcase Spotlight Content, and boost organic content with ads. By leveraging this functionality, companies can streamline their social media efforts, cutting down on expenses and time investment. This integration targets a valuable demographic of Gen Z and Millennials, offering a direct line to engage with these audiences effectively.

news.headline: Viasat to provide secure broadband SATCOM on Airbus C295 MPA Fleet for Spanish MoD. Integration to support defense with 2024 launch.
news.summary: Viasat Inc., a prominent player in satellite communications, shared that their multi-band terminal will be incorporated into Airbus C295 Maritime Patrol Aircraft to aid the Spanish Ministry of Defence. This move was disclosed on June 27, 2024, in Carlsbad, California. Viasat's involvement, as a NASDAQ-listed company under the ticker symbol VSAT, signifies a significant partnership to help bolster defense capabilities.

news.headline: Canadian prepaid account openings surpass debit and credit; growth in industry indicated by CPPO and Datos Insights research.
news.summary: In Toronto, recent research conducted by CPPO and Datos Insights unveils a significant expansion in the Canadian prepaid sector, driven by consumer demand for versatile, technology-focused payment alternatives. This growth is reflected in rising numbers in the fintech sector, as more consumers opt for digital-first payment solutions.

news.headline: Oneview Healthcare named to AVIA Marketplace's 2024 Top Smart Hospitals Companies for innovative patient engagement solutions.
news.summary: A renowned healthcare company, Oneview Healthcare, based in Chicago, has been named a top company in Smart Hospitals for 2024. This recognition was conferred after thorough research and outreach conducted by AVIA Marketplace, a prominent digital health marketplace. Oneview Healthcare stands out for its continuous innovation in the healthcare sector, with a prime focus on developing comprehensive and user-friendly solutions to improve patient engagement. This acknowledgment underscores the company's dedication to advancing healthcare technologies.
